evidence.summary: Python workers, PostgreSQL, S3, FastAPI, and a batch-trained model are declared.
p95 inference target is below 250 ms with weekly retraining.
Audit trails and PHI-safe logging are required.
Known risks include training-serving skew, stale feature definitions, and missing drift alerts.
High-stakes healthcare triage requires explainability and deterministic fallback behavior.

layer_view.responsibility: Serve triage model within latency budget.
Validate claims schemas and serve reusable features.
Version model artifact and evaluation metadata.
Return priority, confidence, and fallback results.
Expose triage results to claims reviewers.
Track drift, model version, PHI-safe audit events, and health.

components.responsibility: Score claims and apply deterministic fallback.

patterns.name: Feature Store
patterns.rationale: Centralizes feature definitions to reduce training-serving skew.

patterns.name: Model Registry
patterns.rationale: Provides versioned model lineage for audit trails and rollback.

patterns.name: Drift Detection
patterns.rationale: Detects stale feature distributions before weekly retraining.

patterns.name: Explainability Wrapper
patterns.rationale: Adds decision rationale required for reviewer trust and audit.

patterns.name: Rule Fallback
patterns.rationale: Preserves service behavior if model serving fails.

quality_scenarios.response: Model registry promotes version with rollback pointer.
Top drivers and model version are displayed.

adrs.title: Adopt feature store for claims features
adrs.context: Stale feature definitions and training-serving skew are known risks.
adrs.decision: Version shared feature definitions in a feature store.
adrs.consequences: Reduces skew and adds platform ownership work.
alternatives: inline features in training and serving

adrs.title: Use deterministic rule fallback
adrs.context: Healthcare triage must degrade safely when model serving fails.
adrs.decision: Route to deterministic rules during model outage.
adrs.consequences: Preserves availability and may reduce accuracy during outage.

debt.mitigation: Move feature definitions into versioned feature store.
Add PSI and model performance drift alerts.
Expose top drivers and model version in reviewer workflow.

evolution_plan.validation: Training and serving use the same feature version.
Drift alert fires on synthetic PSI breach.
Every triage response includes top drivers and model version.
